prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第3名，属全国顶尖层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园 安全事件，但总体事件数较少（3件），影响有限；抖音热度排名第14位（高热），综合热度377万，短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；近年无投档断档记录；拥有39个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、软件工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、光学工程A+、数学A+等，工科实力全国顶尖，对物理类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，非本省高校；2024年 该校在湖南省招生19人（占全国总招生约2.5%），属正常外省招生规模，无明显地域偏好影响；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业持续高热推荐，与浙大优势学科高度匹配；湖南省2026年物理类考生约347,000人，较2025年320,192人增加约8.4 %，竞争加剧；省控线数据：2025年物理类本科批405分、特殊类型招生控制线476分，近年呈小幅下降趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次453名、2026年招生计划持平、湖南省物理 类考生增加约8.4%以及浙大顶尖工科优势学科持续吸引高分考生等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约468名，区间411–525名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 428 → 400 → 399 → 558 → 453. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject requirements (Physics + Chemistry), the ranking significantly dropped to 558, then rebounded to 453 in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 453. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 30, 30, 31, 32, 33 respectively, with a gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan is 33, unchanged from 2025, with no additional expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranks 3rd, belonging to the top tier nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, but the total number of incidents is small (3), with limited impact. Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 3.77 million, high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. No recent records of enrollment gaps. It has 39 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Mathematics A+, etc., with top-tier engineering strength nationwide, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, not a local university in Hunan. In 2024, it enrolled 19 students in Hunan Province (about 2.5% of total national enrollment), a normal out-of-province enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference impact. Popular engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Zhejiang University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition. Provincial control line data: In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 405 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 476 points, showing a slight downward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 453, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category candidates, and Zhejiang University's top engineering advantageous disciplines continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 468, with a range of 411–525.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class) (Free choice of science and engineering majors)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced New Materials Excellence Class) (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Future Science and Engineering) (Physics, Engineering Mechanics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 411–525, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Electronic Information/Intelligent Science) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Chu Kochen Honors College classes as a sprint (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Zhejiang University's engineering strength is top in the country, with popular majors like Computer and Electronic Information being highly competitive. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 220 → 186 → 195 → 242 → 209, with overall fluctuation between 186 and 242, and a baseline of about 209 in 2025; rankings in recent 5 years show narrow oscillations without a clear unilateral trend; enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 31, 31, 31, 44, and 31 respectively, with an expansion to 44 in 2024 followed by a reduction to 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, an increase of 2 (about 6.5%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier nationally; reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, but the number of incidents is small; Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with comprehensive heat of 3.77 million and significant short video exposure; no record of admission gaps in recent years, with the 2023 Hunan liberal arts admission score of 641 being normal; advantageous humanities and social science disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Business Administration A, Law A, Applied Economics A-, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., strongly attracting History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (influenced by Zhang Xuefeng), but Zhejiang University's platform can partially offset negative major sentiment; Hunan Province in 2026 has approximately 187,000 History Category candidates, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; provincial control line data: 2025 History Category undergraduate batch 446 points, special type enrollment control line 503 points; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, not a local university; in 2024, the university enrolled 19 students in Hunan Province (including Physics Category + History Category), a normal out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 209, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 in 2026 (+6.5%), a significant increase of about 31.2% in Hunan History Category candidates, and Zhejiang University's top comprehensive strength continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, the easing effect of the expansion is offset by the surge in candidate numbers; it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking is about 225, with a range of 198–252.
